final:
module RefModule(  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire rst,  
    input wire in,  
    output reg out  
);  

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
    if (rst) begin  
        out <= 0;  
    end else begin  
        out <= in >> 1; // Divide by 2  
    end  
end  
endmodule
